raw_note: Pt reviewed re productive cough, temp + fatigue x5 days. Chest clear enough for home mx. Likely LRTI. Start amoxicillin 500mg tds for 5 days. Encourage fluids + rest. Paracetamol prn for fever/discomfort. If temp persists >48 hrs after starting abx, or cough/breathing worsens, book GP review. Seek urgent help via 111/999 if SOB at rest, chest pain, confusion or unable to keep fluids down.
